view.revealHint: Space or Enter to reveal · → to skip
view.question: QUESTION
view.resaveHint: Re-save this exercise to see the correct answer
view.selectAll: Select all that apply ({{count}} correct answers)
view.tapToBuild: Tap words below to build the sentence...
view.orderPlaceholder: Type the sentence in the correct order...
view.allUpToDate: 🎉 All exercises are up to date! Come back when reviews are due.
view.ratingHint: Again · Hard · Good · Easy — each deck remembers its own schedule

cardsStepper.label: Cards per session
cardsStepper.allDue: All due exercises will be included

random.label: Random
random.description: Again cards re-enter the pool at a random position, up to a limited number of times

allCorrect.label: Until Correct
allCorrect.description: Again cards keep re-entering the pool until answered correctly

once.label: Once
once.description: Again cards are shown one more time before the session ends

never.label: Never
never.description: Again cards are not repeated during the session

maxReinsertions.label: Max re-insertions
maxReinsertions.hint: How many times an Again card re-enters the pool

maxHardRepeats.label: Max repeats in session
maxHardRepeats.hint: Before deferring to the next day

hardDelayHours.label: Delay after session (hours)
hardDelayHours.hint: Applied from the 2nd Hard occurrence onwards

goodDays.label: Good — first interval (days)
goodDays.hint: Days until a Good-rated card is reviewed again

easyDays.label: Easy — first interval (days)
easyDays.hint: Days until an Easy-rated card is reviewed again

timerEnabled.label: Study with timer
timerEnabled.hint: Reveal answer automatically when time runs out

timerSeconds.hint: Answer reveals automatically when this runs out

connError.noConnection: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
connError.serverError: The server is unavailable right now. Please try again shortly.

orderSentence.label: Order Sentence
orderSentence.description: Arrange shuffled words into the correct order

success.title: You're now Pro!
success.subtitle: Your account has been upgraded. Everything is unlocked.

create-first-deck.title: Create your first deck
create-first-deck.description: Decks hold the exercises you'll study. Start with just one.

complete-first-session.title: Run your first study session
complete-first-session.description: Study sessions use spaced repetition to show you cards right before you forget them. Try a quick session on one of your decks to see how it adapts to your answers.

sign-in-to-sync.title: Sign in to sync across devices
sign-in-to-sync.description: Create a free account so your decks and progress sync between your phone and the web app. You can also keep using Mnemova as a guest — syncing just keeps everything backed up and available everywhere.

enable-study-reminders.title: Turn on study reminders
enable-study-reminders.description: Enable notifications and we'll remind you when cards are due for review, so you don't lose your streak.

build-library.title: Build your library to 3 decks
build-library.description: A broader library makes your study sessions more varied.
